top3.sql:
SELECT 
    d_year,
    d_moy AS month,
    CASE 
        WHEN ss_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 'STORE'
        WHEN ws_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 'WEB'
        ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
    END AS sales_channel,
    SUM(COALESCE(ss_ext_sales_price, ws_ext_sales_price)) AS total_sales
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ss_sold_date_sk,
        NULL AS ws_sold_date_sk,
        ss_ext_sales_price,
        NULL AS ws_ext_sales_price
    FROM store_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        NULL AS ss_sold_date_sk,
  ...
